title: Joint Probability Distribution of Two Discrete Random Variables
description: A table illustrating the joint probabilities of all possible outcome pairs for two discrete random variables X and Y.
elements: Random Variable X (with outcomes x₁, x₂... xₙ)
Random Variable Y (with outcomes y₁, y₂... yₘ)
relationships: The joint probability P(X=xᵢ, Y=yⱼ) is located at the intersection of row for Y=yⱼ and column for X=xᵢ, forming a complete probability distribution table
